sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73945" key="o)mfakomeli/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀμφᾰκο-μελίτης</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῑ]</pron> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οἶνος,</foreign> <sense id="n73945.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὀμφακόμελι</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:39" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.39</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
